div.h1: Pool Free Operation: O(1) Push to Head

g.text: Step 4: Push to Free List Head

ol.li: Bounds check: ptr >= base && ptr < end

Decrement counter: allocated-- Key insight: Block 2 is now at the head of the free list.
Next pool_alloc() will return Block 2 (LIFO order).

div.p: c (void*)Block2 = free_list_head; // Block2->next = Block3 free_list_head = Block2; // New head pool->allocated--;

g.text: Block 2 now stores pointer to Block 3
